subcodes.first_line: O my Lord, my Hope and Ultimate Goal of my aspirations! Thou seest Thy sincere servants who have arisen to serve Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: رب و رجائی و غاية آمالی تری عبادک المخلصين قاموا علی خدمتک
